name: Window Management
title: Window Management
intro: You can open the various windows via the Home Ribbon Tab.
Various types are available for the windows. Each prompts a different response from the window.
There are the following types of window:

paragraphs: Windows of this type can be docked anywhere in the main window and are always at the front.
Position markers appear which you can use to specify the position:
You want to return the Properties and Toolbox tabs in the Panel Designer to their default view.
The Properties dialog and the Toolbox are represented as tabs in the Panel Designer.
You want to use the default view of the Properties dialog and the Toolbox.
Select the Properties tab by moving your mouse over the element and left-clicking it.
Drag the element up while holding down the left mouse button.
Now drag the element in the direction of the lower blue arrow.
A gray area appears that indicates the future position, size and shape of the element.
Release the left mouse button when the gray area appears.
The element is now positioned as indicated by the gray area.

paragraphs: Windows of this type are hidden at the edge of the main window and appear as tabs when the auto-hide function is activated.
The auto-hide function is activated and deactivated using the following symbols, which appear in the window header:
